name: henriksoderlund-website
description: Henrik Söderlund's personal website - Technology Leader & AI Innovator. Built with Astro 6, TypeScript, and deployed on Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.build: astro check && astro build && node scripts/patch-wrangler.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.check: astro check && astro build && node scripts/patch-wrangler.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.deploy: astro build && node scripts/patch-wrangler.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs && wrangler deploy
